Identification.LongTitle: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Lacolle
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Lacolle

Provision.Text: This enactment changes the name of the electoral district of Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Lacolle to 芒聙聹Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Les Jardins-de-Napierville芒聙聺.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.MarginalNote: Name changed to 芒聙聹Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Les Jardins-de-Napierville芒聙聺
Section.Text: In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 21 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name 芒聙聹Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Les Jardins-de-Napierville芒聙聺 for the name 芒聙聹Ch脙垄teauguay芒聙聰Lacolle芒聙聺.

This Act comes into force six months after the day on which it receives royal assent unless the Chief Electoral Officer publishes, before that day, a notice in the Canada Gazette that all the preparations necessary for the implementation of this Act have been made and that it may therefore come into force, in which case this Act comes into force on the day that the notice is published.
